economic_notes: Lucky Man Cree Nation has the smallest membership within Treaty 6. Member of Battlefords Tribal Council (BTC), which has investments in property, hotels, and gaming. Legacy Trust funds held with CIBC Private Wealth Management valued at $2,804,563. Ottawa Trust Fund (capital and revenue trust) held in Consolidated Revenue Fund of Canada.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit report signed May 5, 2025 — significant delay. Prior year (2020) included a large one-time claim proceeds of $2,668,285 which inflated prior revenue and surplus substantially. Loan facility of $1,136,263 from CIBC is secured by the Legacy Trust. Funds Held in Trust of $4,501,000 includes Ottawa Trust ($1,696,436) and Legacy Trust ($2,804,563) but only Ottawa Trust is on balance sheet per notes — discrepancy noted. Long-term debt (loan facility) classified under current liabilities on balance sheet. Expenses_salaries_total estimated from Schedule A wages ($118,771) + Schedule C wages ($37,282) + Schedule D wages ($64) + Schedule G wages ($72,692) = $228,809 plus Schedule F salaries ($0) = $228,809. No schedule of remuneration provided. The loan facility is shown under current liabilities on the balance sheet.
